name: FireBullet
shortDescription: Fire bullets with ammo count, reload timer, and overheat management.

eventsBasedBehaviors.description: Fire bullets with built-in cooldown, ammo, reloading, and overheating. Once added to your object that must shoot, use the behavior actions to fire another object as a bullet. These actions check all constraints internally (can be called without conditions, they will only fire when ready) and will make the bullet move (using a permanent force).
eventsBasedBehaviors.name: FireBullet

eventsFunctions.name: FireTowardObject
eventsFunctions.description: Fire bullets toward an object at a specified speed. Call this continuously, the action checks readiness internally — no extra timer or check needed.

eventsFunctions.name: FireTowardPosition
eventsFunctions.description: Fire bullets toward a position at a specified speed. Call this continuously, the action checks readiness internally — no extra timer or check needed.

eventsFunctions.name: Fire
eventsFunctions.description: Fire bullets in the direction of a given angle at a specified speed. Call this continuously, the action checks readiness internally — no extra timer or check needed.

eventsFunctions.name: ReloadAmmo
eventsFunctions.description: Reload ammo.

eventsFunctions.name: HasJustFired
eventsFunctions.description: Check if the object has just fired something.

eventsFunctions.name: BulletRotationEnabled
eventsFunctions.description: Check if bullet rotates to match trajectory.

eventsFunctions.name: FiringArc
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the firing arc (in degrees) where bullets are shot. Bullets are evenly spaced out inside the firing arc.

eventsFunctions.name: SetFiringArcOp
eventsFunctions.description: Change the firing arc (in degrees) where bullets are shot. Bullets are evenly spaced out inside the firing arc.

eventsFunctions.name: AngleVariance
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the angle variance (in degrees) applied to each bullet.

eventsFunctions.name: SetAngleVarianceOp
eventsFunctions.description: Change the angle variance (in degrees) applied to each bullet.

eventsFunctions.name: BulletSpeedVariance
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the bullet speed variance (pixels per second) applied to each bullet.

eventsFunctions.name: SetBulletSpeedVarianceOp
eventsFunctions.description: Change the bullet speed variance (pixels per second) applied to each bullet.

eventsFunctions.name: BulletQuantity
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the number of bullets shot every time the "fire bullet" action is used.

eventsFunctions.name: SetBulletQuantityOp
eventsFunctions.description: Change the number of bullets shot every time the "fire bullet" action is used.

eventsFunctions.name: SetBulletLayer
eventsFunctions.description: Change the layer that bullets are created on.

eventsFunctions.name: SetRotateBullet
eventsFunctions.description: Enable bullet rotation.

eventsFunctions.name: SetUnlimitedAmmo
eventsFunctions.description: Enable unlimited ammo.

eventsFunctions.name: Cooldown
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the firing cooldown (in seconds) also known as rate of fire.

eventsFunctions.name: SetCooldownOp
eventsFunctions.description: Change the firing cooldown (in seconds) also known as rate of fire.

eventsFunctions.name: ReloadDuration
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the reload duration (in seconds).

eventsFunctions.name: SetReloadDurationOp
eventsFunctions.description: Change the reload duration (in seconds).

eventsFunctions.name: OverheatDuration
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the overheat duration (in seconds). When an object is overheated, it can't fire for this duration.

eventsFunctions.name: SetOverheatDurationOp
eventsFunctions.description: Change the overheat duration (in seconds). When an object is overheated, it can't fire for this duration.

eventsFunctions.name: AmmoQuantity
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the ammo quantity.

eventsFunctions.name: SetAmmoQuantityOp
eventsFunctions.description: Change the ammo quantity.

eventsFunctions.name: HeatIncreasePerShot
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the heat increase per shot.

eventsFunctions.name: SetHeatPerShotOp
eventsFunctions.description: Change the heat increase per shot.

eventsFunctions.name: MaxAmmo
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the max ammo.

eventsFunctions.name: SetMaxAmmoOp
eventsFunctions.description: Change the max ammo.

eventsFunctions.name: ResetTotalShotsFired
eventsFunctions.description: Reset total shots fired.

eventsFunctions.name: ResetTotalBulletsCreated
eventsFunctions.description: Reset total bullets created.

eventsFunctions.name: ResetTotalReloadsCompleted
eventsFunctions.description: Reset total reloads completed.

eventsFunctions.name: ShotsPerReload
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the number of shots per reload.

eventsFunctions.name: SetShotsPerReloadOp
eventsFunctions.description: Change the number of shots per reload.

eventsFunctions.name: SetAutomaticReload
eventsFunctions.description: Enable (or disable) automatic reloading.

eventsFunctions.name: LinearCoolingRate
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the linear cooling rate (per second).

eventsFunctions.name: SetLinearCoolingRateOp
eventsFunctions.description: Change the linear cooling rate (per second).

eventsFunctions.name: ExponentialCoolingRate
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the exponential cooling rate, per second.

eventsFunctions.name: SetExponentialCoolingRateOp
eventsFunctions.description: Change the exponential cooling rate, per second.

eventsFunctions.name: IncreaseAmmo
eventsFunctions.description: Increase ammo quantity.

eventsFunctions.name: BulletLayer
eventsFunctions.description: Layer that bullets are created on.

eventsFunctions.name: HeatLevel
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the heat level (range: 0 to 1).

eventsFunctions.name: TotalShotsFired
eventsFunctions.description: Total shots fired (multi-bullet shots are considered one shot).

eventsFunctions.name: TotalBulletsCreated
eventsFunctions.description: Total bullets created.

eventsFunctions.name: TotalReloadsCompleted
eventsFunctions.description: Reloads completed.

eventsFunctions.name: ShotsBeforeNextReload
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the remaining shots before the next reload is required.

eventsFunctions.name: CooldownTimeLeft
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the remaining duration before the cooldown will permit a bullet to be fired, in seconds.

eventsFunctions.name: OverheatTimeLeft
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the remaining duration before the overheat penalty ends, in seconds.

eventsFunctions.name: ReloadTimeLeft
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the remaining duration before the reload finishes, in seconds.

eventsFunctions.name: IsReloadInProgress
eventsFunctions.description: Check if object is currently performing an ammo reload.

eventsFunctions.name: IsReadyToShoot
eventsFunctions.description: Check if object is ready to shoot.

eventsFunctions.name: IsAutomaticReloadingEnabled
eventsFunctions.description: Check if automatic reloading is enabled.

eventsFunctions.name: IsUnlimitedAmmo
eventsFunctions.description: Check if ammo is unlimited.

eventsFunctions.name: IsOutOfAmmo
eventsFunctions.description: Check if object has no ammo available.

eventsFunctions.name: IsReloadNeeded
eventsFunctions.description: Check if object needs to reload ammo.

eventsFunctions.name: IsOverheated
eventsFunctions.description: Check if object is overheated.

eventsFunctions.name: IsFiringCooldownActive
eventsFunctions.description: Check if firing cooldown is active.

description:
This extension allows objects to fire bullets. To use it, add the behavior to the object that will shoot, then use the provided action to launch another object as the bullet.

The properties of the behavior can be used to customize:
- Cooldown between shots
- Firing multiple bullets at a time ([open the project online](https://editor.gdevelop.io/?project=example://fire-bullet))
- Ammo management
- Overheat

The speed can be specified when using the actions to fire the bullets.
The bullets are automatically given a permanent force to make them move in the 2D plane (no need to use a linear movement or move them with another behavior).

It can be used for:
- Twin-stick shooters ([open the project online](https://editor.gdevelop.io/?project=example://conviction-of-gun-dude-desktop))
- Shoot'em up ([open the project online](https://editor.gdevelop.io/?project=example://space-shooter))

A simple example shows how to make firing patterns ([open the project online](https://editor.gdevelop.io/?project=example://firing-patterns)).
